entry.title: [RCM-142198] - 1H 2025 Release - Enhanced Application Data Download - Permissions
entry.content:
Hello SAP,

I have the following question on the Enhanced Application Data Download [RCM-142198] feature delivered with the 1H 2025 release for the Partner Q&A session. Exporting candidate PII data from the SuccessFactors instance removes this data from the access control and the DRTM measures established in SuccessFactors. Therefore, this is a risk for data privacy and compliance. To prevent GDPR violations:
- how can this feature be deactivated completely? 
- how can this feature be restricted to be available only to a restricted set of users?

Kind regards

Roman

entry.title: Re: EWM PGI for set of outbound deliveries with same Rout...
entry.content: When the standard transaction VL06G is there to cater your requirement, not sure, whether you explored this

entry.title: Re: SAP RAP - ABAP Runtime Error 'BEHAVIOR_ILLEGAL_STATEMENT
entry.content: how about just removing those commit/rollback call?

entry.title: Re: Access Error in HANA CV - DBTech JDBC: [258]: insufficient privilege: [2950] user is not authori
entry.content:
Hi together, 

please select by Apply Privileges --> "Classical Analytic Privileges" 

 

BR, Michael

entry.title: Re: Saving / opening a model (PDM) takes far too long
entry.content:
You can create a single default diagram that provides links to the other diagrams. This diagram contains links to seven other diagrams (double-click an icon to open the diagram) - to create these icons, just drag them onto your diagram from the browser.

I changed the image for six of the diagrams - right-click an icon and select Change Image.

entry.title: Re: Cannot read property 'businessPartner' of undefined
entry.content: Is solved

entry.title: Calibration vs 9-box Matrix Grid
entry.content:
Hi Community,
We are looking for a customer-facing Calibration and 9-box matrix document that describes the general process of calibration vs 9-box matrix grid without getting overly technical. Be great to have examples. 

Thank you

entry.title: SAP S/4 Public Cloud - Post Incoming Payment Integration
entry.content:
Dear All

We have generated 1000s of bills by integrating POS with SAP SD Module. Now there is a requirement to post incoming payments against billing in the background either using Business Object Interface or by calling API.

Within api.sap.com, we are getting only below options

  1. SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Customer Payments API ( To use these APIs, you must have the licensing for the product SAP S4/HANA Cloud for customer payments ). 
  2. Business Object Interface - I_JOURNALENTRYTP

Both of the options are not looking feasible to post and clear incoming payments of bills generated against delivery documents within SD Module..

Is there any alternate to automate the incoming payments within SAP Public Cloud by using Billing Documents generated within SAP Public Cloud - SD Module.

entry.title: Re: Configuring BTP Destination in Advanced Event Mesh fo...
entry.content: Hi Willem, we are facing a weird problem; while using the first approach (i.e. REST call from AEM to CAP endpoint). Although the request comes fine in CAP, I can see my breakpoint being hit but the actual payload is not available in the request body. is there some special config for that?

entry.title: Re: Inquiry : Learning Hub order process pending over a week
entry.content: Thank you, Margit! I received a response this morning and going to resubmit the order.

entry.title: Expanded navigation property is alway null when using drafts
entry.content:
Hi,

I have this CDS model.

entity ApiEntities : cuid {
    api  : Association to Apis;
    type : Association to ApiEntityTypes;
}

entity ApiEntityTypes : cuid {
    api         : Association to Apis;
}

entity Apis : cuid {
    apiEntities     : Composition of many ApiEntities
                          on apiEntities.api = $self;
    apiEntityTypes  : Composition of many ApiEntityTypes
                          on apiEntityTypes.api = $self;
}

I added this annotation to enable drafts.

annotate service.Apis with @(odata.draft.enabled);

Then i created all of those entities as drafts.

POST /Apis
{
	"IsActiveEntity": false
}
POST /ApiEntityTypes
{
	"IsActiveEntity": false,
	"api_ID": "1798c58c-a5cf-47f1-a063-61cf5a5dee65"
}
POST /ApiEntities
{
	"IsActiveEntity": false,
	"api_ID": "1798c58c-a5cf-47f1-a063-61cf5a5dee65",
	"type_ID": "5402f265-af8f-4c4f-b04e-af4a68719d7f"
}

Now i want to expand type in ApiEntity but "type" is always null. Is this intended?

GET /ApiEntities?$expand=type
{
	"@context": "$metadata#ApiEntities(type())/$entity",
	"@metadataEtag": "W/\"0a468f163ee40f0e57c70e0ef1a9501919bd6af288e112a6bbe498346e97f613\"",
	"ID": "447dfabf-2ace-438a-bb11-2dcd47bab912",
	"api_ID": "1798c58c-a5cf-47f1-a063-61cf5a5dee65",
	"type_ID": "5402f265-af8f-4c4f-b04e-af4a68719d7f",
	"IsActiveEntity": false,
	"HasActiveEntity": false,
	"HasDraftEntity": false,
	"type": null,
	"DraftAdministrativeData": {
		"DraftUUID": "38ff890b-467c-436e-a8af-1de522705c1d",
		"CreationDateTime": null,
		"CreatedByUser": null,
		"DraftIsCreatedByMe": null,
		"LastChangeDateTime": null,
		"LastChangedByUser": null,
		"InProcessByUser": null,
		"DraftIsProcessedByMe": null
	}
}

If I activate this draft Apis object and call /ApiEntities?$expand=type again, then expand works.

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Apps - upload files to SAP Document Management Service (DMS) repository with file pick
entry.content:
Hi @mingkho,

Very interesting. Just curious: how would you go about picking multiple files simultaneously and post them using the same "HTTP destination request"?

Thanks.

LM.

entry.title: Create recurring pay component of same type using business rules
entry.content:
Hi

  I have a requirement to create multiple non recurring payment ie for every year till they are in a particular location. The years can be more than 10 also, so I believe it is not recommended to write the logic in Business rule. So, is there a way to achieve it.

Thanks

Sri

entry.title: Re: Incorrect Cost (FIFO) When Returning
entry.content: Hi Matija. You are correct. The decimals difference caused this rounding issue. I thought it could be something else, but after testing same scenario using same decimals for amount and price, the calculation was correct. Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Past 1 week fr 17-Mar-2025 i am waiting for my SAP Le...
entry.content: Hi All, Received last email response from SAP STORE ADMIN Support Team member on 26-Mar-2025 informing my ticket (SAP Store ID: 0002216077) is under process and i will be informed once done. My request is that the deadline for certification assessment date is 31-Mar-2025 and it is only 3 days more to go. Hope the SAP STORE ADMIN team will expedite processing of my ticket before the deadline date of 31-Mar-2025. Thank you, Meganathan.

entry.title: Conditionally send a standard event from SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Cloud to BTP Event Mesh
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am exploring the event mesh functionality on BTP Cloud Integration Suite. My scenarios is when a sales order item delivery date is changed, I need to send an event to BTP Event Mesh. I know standard event topic 'sap/s4/beh/salesorder/v1/SalesOrder/ItemChanged/v1' is available but it is sent for any change on sales order item. I think this cannot be achieved with mere filtering by any properties.

Is there any way I can influence the event publish from SAP S/4HANA Cloud to send only in case of change to delivery date if sales order item?

If not, the event consumer has to call s/4hana cloud api to get the sales order detail. In this case how can we know that delivery date has changed and not any other fields?

Best regards,

Sumit

entry.title: Re: req.user.id does not give me my user email id from SAP Build Workzone tile.
entry.content: @MioYasutake  Once the SAP CAPM application is deployed. I am using the test-srv, xsuaa credentials bound for the same and creating a destination in the SAP BTP subaccount under the Destinations tab. This is being authenticated via destination with bound XSUAA credentials when I am clicking on a Fiori List Report tile hosted on SAP Build Workzone.

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Apps - upload files to SAP Document Management Service (DMS) repository with file pick
entry.content:
Hi @Ludovic_MOOS , 

You can loop through the files array by repeating the logic flows while keeping track of the filesCount in a page variable, for example, and for each file, you post them via the "HTTP destination request".

However, if you need to send multiple files in just 1 multipart/form-data POST request (i.e. in a single "HTTP destination request"), then it's unfortunately not yet supported.

Regards

Ming

entry.title: Custom Fields Not Updating in BAPI_PO_CHANGE
entry.content:
I am currently working on a project where I need to update custom fields in a purchase order using the BAPI_PO_CHANGE function module. Despite my efforts, the custom fields isdind and branch in the EKKO table are not updating as expected. Below is the code I am using:

 

DATA: p_ebeln        TYPE ekko-ebeln,
      po_items       TYPE TABLE OF bapimepoitem,
      i_bapi_return  TYPE TABLE OF bapiret2,
      wa_header_data TYPE bapiekko,
      lt_extensionin TYPE TABLE OF bapiparex,
      ls_extensionin TYPE bapiparex,
      bapi_te_po     TYPE bapi_te_mepoheader,
      bapi_te_pox    TYPE bapi_te_mepoheaderx,
      lv_isdind      TYPE bapi_te_mepoheader-isdind.

DATA: lt_final       TYPE TABLE OF  ztglint012,
      ls_final       TYPE           ztglint012,
      lt_ekko        TYPE TABLE OF  ekko,
      ls_ekko        TYPE           ekko,
      lt_ekpo        TYPE TABLE OF  ekpo,
      ls_ekpo        TYPE           ekpo,
      po_item        TYPE TABLE OF  bapimepoitem,
      ls_po_item     TYPE           bapimepoitem,
      po_schedule    TYPE  TABLE OF bapimeposchedule,
      ls_po_schedule TYPE           bapimeposchedule,
      po_acc         TYPE TABLE OF  bapimepoaccount,
      ls_po_acc      TYPE           bapimepoaccount,
      po_services    TYPE TABLE OF  bapiesllc,
      ls_po_services TYPE           bapiesllc,
      lv_delivery_dt TYPE           sy-datum,
      lv_del_st_dt   TYPE           sy-datum,
      lv_del_ed_dt   TYPE           sy-datum,
      lv_count       TYPE           i,
      lv_packno      TYPE           packno.

DATA: po_itemx       TYPE TABLE OF bapimepoitemx,
      ls_po_itemx    TYPE           bapimepoitemx,
      po_schedx      TYPE TABLE OF bapimeposchedulx,
      ls_po_schedx   TYPE           bapimeposchedulx.

p_ebeln = '3320000061'. 

" Call the BAPI to get PO details
CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_PO_GETDETAIL1'
  EXPORTING
    purchaseorder = p_ebeln
    services      = 'X'
  TABLES
    poitem        = po_item
    poschedule    = po_schedule
    poaccount     = po_acc
    poservices    = po_services.

" Check for errors
IF sy-subrc <> 0.
  LOOP AT i_bapi_return INTO DATA(ls_return).
    IF ls_return-type = 'E'.
      WRITE: / 'Error:', ls_return-message.
      EXIT.
    ENDIF.
  ENDLOOP.
ENDIF.

DATA: ld_ponumber   TYPE ebeln,
      lt_return     TYPE TABLE OF bapiret2,
      it_extension  TYPE TABLE OF bapiparex,
      ext_container TYPE bapiparex.

ld_ponumber = '3320000061'. 

CLEAR it_extension[].

* Fill the custom fields for header
*bapi_te_po-po_number = ld_ponumber.
bapi_te_po-isdind = 'X'. " lv_isdind
bapi_te_po-branch = 'MAH'. " lv_branch

*bapi_te_pox-po_number = ld_ponumber.
bapi_te_pox-isdind = 'X'.
bapi_te_pox-branch = 'X'.

ext_container-structure = 'BAPI_TE_MEPOHEADER'.
cl_abap_container_utilities=>fill_container_c(
  EXPORTING
    im_value    = bapi_te_po
  IMPORTING
    ex_container = ext_container+30 ).
APPEND ext_container TO it_extension.

ext_container-structure = 'BAPI_TE_MEPOHEADERX'.
cl_abap_container_utilities=>fill_container_c(
  EXPORTING
    im_value    = bapi_te_pox
  IMPORTING
    ex_container = ext_container+30 ).
APPEND ext_container TO it_extension.

* Populate POITEMX and POSCHEDULEX
LOOP AT po_item INTO ls_po_item.
  ls_po_itemx-po_item = ls_po_item-po_item.
  ls_po_itemx-quantity = 'X'. " Example field
  APPEND ls_po_itemx TO po_itemx.
ENDLOOP.

LOOP AT po_schedule INTO ls_po_schedule.
  ls_po_schedx-po_item = ls_po_schedule-po_item.
  ls_po_schedx-sched_line = ls_po_schedule-sched_line.

  IF ls_po_schedule-po_item IS NOT INITIAL.
    ls_po_schedx-po_item = 'X'.
  ENDIF.
  IF ls_po_schedule-sched_line IS NOT INITIAL.
    ls_po_schedx-sched_line = 'X'.
  ENDIF.
  IF ls_po_schedule-del_datcat_ext IS NOT INITIAL.
    ls_po_schedx-del_datcat_ext = 'X'.
  ENDIF.
  IF ls_po_schedule-delivery_date IS NOT INITIAL.
    ls_po_schedx-delivery_date = 'X'.
  ENDIF.
  IF ls_po_schedule-quantity IS NOT INITIAL.
    ls_po_schedx-quantity = 'X'.
  ENDIF.
  IF ls_po_schedule-deliv_time IS NOT INITIAL.
    ls_po_schedx-deliv_time = 'X'.
  ENDIF.
  IF ls_po_schedule-stat_date IS NOT INITIAL.
    ls_po_schedx-stat_date = 'X'.
  ENDIF.
  IF ls_po_schedule-preq_item IS NOT INITIAL.
    ls_po_schedx-preq_item = 'X'.
  ENDIF.
  IF ls_po_schedule-po_date IS NOT INITIAL.
    ls_po_schedx-po_date = 'X'.
  ENDIF.
  APPEND ls_po_schedx TO po_schedx.
ENDLOOP.

* Call the BAPI to update the purchase order
CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_PO_CHANGE'
  EXPORTING
    purchaseorder = ld_ponumber
  TABLES
    return        = lt_return
    poitem        = po_item
    poitemx       = po_itemx
*    poschedule    = po_schedule
*    poschedx      = po_schedx
    poaccount     = po_acc
    poservices    = po_services
    extensionin   = it_extension.

* Commit the changes
CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_TRANSACTION_COMMIT'
  EXPORTING
    wait = 'X'.

entry.title: I have no access to download software for database ASE 16.1
entry.content:
I have access to the SAP ASE 16.1 download folder but there are no files to be downloaded.

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: I have no access to download software for database AS...
entry.content: The ASE 16.1 version is not available for BS/ASE yet. You may refer to the Targeted ASE 16.x Release Schedule and CR list Information on the SAP Help Portal for more information. Additionally, you can also refer to KBA 3386206 - Which is the current latest ASE version? on SAP ASE for the latest information on available versions.

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4 Public Cloud - Post Incoming Payment Integration
entry.content:
Hello dear user,

Have you tried the Manage Automatic Payments app ?

This allows you to post and clear at the same time.

I hope this will help you answer your question.

Best regards,

Jeremy

entry.title: Function module parameter not found
entry.content:
I have an odd situation with an Export parameter not being found in my include.

Here's the function declaration;

function z_ca_get_cluster.
*"----------------------------------------------------------------------
*"*"Local Interface:
*" IMPORTING
*" VALUE(IM_PROVIDER) TYPE ZCADEPARTMENT OPTIONAL
*" VALUE(IM_SUBPROVIDER) TYPE ZCASUBDEPT OPTIONAL
*" EXPORTING
*" REFERENCE(EX_FILE) TYPE FILE_TABLE. <--- Problem parameter
*" REFERENCE(EX_CLUSTERID) <--- Also not found
*"----------------------------------------------------------------------

clear: gt_recover.

Here's the includes;

*******************************************************************
* System-defined Include-files. *
*******************************************************************
include lzcaclustertop. " Global Declarations
include lzcaclusteruxx. " Function Modules

*******************************************************************
* User-defined Include-files (if necessary). *
*******************************************************************
include lzcaclusterlcl.

And here we are inside the include which has an issue;

class lcl_handler implementation.

method on_hotspot_click.
data: ld_value type zcafilename,
ld_row type lvc_s_row.
field-symbols: <row> type zcaclusterid.
sender->get_current_cell( importing e_value = ld_value es_row_id = ld_row ).

ex_file = ld_value.

...

endmethod.

endclass.

If I try to activate it, I get the following error;

Field "EX_FILE" is unknown.

I have tried activating the include by itself and I have tried activating everything together. I have tried deleting and readding the export parameters, but nothing seems to change this error. I have even tried forcing the activation but it short dumps when I try to run it.

entry.title: Inbound delivery needed for EWM or not?
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am new here, do we need to have inbound delivery (must) in embedded EWM S4 Hana?

I which cases, it is preferred to have an inbound delivery and in which cases not? for example syncronous goods movement. 

please suggest.

entry.title: Re: How to Create a Date Type Field in LMS
entry.content: This seems like a big miss on something that feels basic. We are in the same boat as the OP. You get promoted, your job entry date changes, and we can't use date operators to make a basic AP comparison because the field is a string..

entry.title: Re: Create SAP Build Apps applications in minutes with AI
entry.content:
@patrick_schad this is fantastic! Would you be able to share a subsequent blog that details how to enhance this generated output?

For example, how to rename the column headings or format date/currency output that may not be nicely formatted coming from the OData API output by itself?

entry.title: Settlement Management - Conditon Contract Validity in past
entry.content:
Creating a contract in the past and then attempting to run settlememt for delta accruals

Found that the pricing date is set to posting date which has to be in the open period and is outside of validity

We therefore get 0 accruals because the price conditions are not valid

Any ideas on how to correct other than changing price date determination which means we would need to create new settlement doc types because we have used standard

 

Tim

entry.title: [PLT-86245] - 1H 2025 Release - Monitoring Tool for IAS - LMS-IAS Integration support capabilities
entry.content:
Hello SAP,

I have the following question on the Enhancements to Monitoring Tool for Identity Authentication and Identity Provisioning [PLT-86245] feature delivered with the 1H 2025 release for the Partner Q&A session: 
- which capabilities does the monitoring tool provide for the LMS-IAS integration upgrade, esp. in the area of trouble shooting?

Kind regards

Roman

entry.title: Re: EC Promotion - Promote link in worksheet is not avail...
entry.content: @Rodrigo_Lopes What I meant is make sure FBP is set to Edit on all promotion related fields (Job Family, Job Code, Job Role and PayGrade)

entry.title: Re: Negative value not allowed for depreciation area 93
entry.content: Well, we have put all areas to allow negative values (where possible) in the app Manage Fixed Assets, but the error remains.

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Apps - upload files to SAP Document Management Service (DMS) repository with file pick
entry.content: Thanks @mingkho. Just to be clear: does it mean that if I build an app for my clients to upload and post us documents, they will have to upload the files one by one?

entry.title: Re: Create recurring pay component of same type using bus...
entry.content: It's an EC or integration question, not Compensation. @Sri_bs

entry.title: Re: Onb Emails
entry.content: Has anyone been able to add conditions within the HTML to have different branding dynamically appear based on the new hire's legal entity? If not, how have other teams solved for this requirement?

entry.title: Re: *****PAGE NUMBER WHILE EXPORTING TO PDF - SAP BO*****
entry.content:
Hi rohitsapbi
This behaviour is "by design" in BI 4.3 and previous versions.

1. What I did is name the reports as "Chaper 1", "Chapter 2" ... and in the footer cell use the functions ReportName() and Page().
For better vizualization of chapters in th PDF, you can also add spaces in report names to have bookmarks indentation.

2. Else, you can use a post-treatment software of pdf files to replace text inside the generated file.
For example, replace "###PageNumber###" with the real value.

Hope this helps.

entry.title: Re: Assertion Faileure 201503
entry.content:
There are no recent backups and we are looking to see if we have any older backups that are archived that don't have the corruption.
We have tried the -f but the issue still persists unfortunately.

entry.title: Re: SAP B1 Web Client Extension Not Showing
entry.content: I ran this command to check the permissions and it seems that the user b1service0 already has the valid permission 🤔

entry.title: Re: Inbound delivery needed for EWM or not?
entry.content:
Hi @AAkash1 ,

Is this only for Purchase Order ?

do we need to have inbound delivery (must) in embedded EWM S4 Hana? - No, Please see fantastic blog 

https://community.sap.com/t5/supply-chain-management-blogs-by-members/synchronous-goods-receipts-in-ewm-for-external-procurement-po-based-with/ba-p/13515822 

"I which cases, it is preferred to have an inbound delivery and in which cases not? for example syncronous goods movement. " -> As per my experience, In case Advance Shipping Notification (ASN)  then you need inbound delivery otherwise not require if vendor/Supplier truck arrives without any notification. you can directly GR then create tasks for further Putaway...

Please let us know if further questions.

Kind Regards,

Ajit

entry.title: Re: 🚨 SAP Build Apps – Access Denied (403 Forbidden) – S...
entry.content:
Hello,

We are having the same problem in eu10 region. We were able to create new projects since few weeks ago, but now we get a 403 Forbidden.

May it be the same issue? How can we solve it?

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4 Public Cloud - Post Incoming Payment Integration
entry.content: Thanks Jeremy for quick response, actually we are looking for some automation and integration i.e. as soon as Sales Order and Billing created in system by fetching sale data from Point of Sale using Integration Suite, next action to post the payments also trigger through integration as there can be 10000s of order per day.

entry.title: Re: Settlement Management - Conditon Contract Validity in...
entry.content:
Hi @tim_parsons3, 

Thanks for your question. Based on your description, it sounds like there's a misunderstanding between the Pricing Date and Posting Date behavior in the delta accrual process. Let me clarify how standard SAP CCM handles this:

1. Delta Accruals and Pricing Date

In the standard configuration, delta accruals use the Final Settlement Date as the Pricing Date. This setting is defined in the Settlement Settings of the Condition Contract Type. So, even if you're creating the delta accrual retroactively, the pricing should still apply based on the last date of the contract validity period (or the last defined Final Settlement Date).

2. Why You're Seeing 0 Accruals

There are two common reasons for this:

  • You may have pricing conditions with limited validity that don’t cover the Final Settlement Date. If no valid pricing condition exists for that date, the system will calculate zero accrual.
  • If you have multiple pricing conditions (same key combination) for different time periods and want the accruals to reflect each rate within its valid time frame, then the standard logic won't split the calculation accordingly by default.

3. How to Handle This Requirement

If your business needs the system to apply different rates based on the validity periods of pricing conditions (rather than applying the rate valid only on the final date), then you'll need to adjust your configuration by enabling:
 "Split by Settlement Condition Validity"
This setting allows the system to split items by date ranges and apply the correct pricing condition for each corresponding business volume period.

4. About Posting Date

The Posting Date of the settlement document is determined at runtime during Settlement Execution. It's used for FI posting purposes only and has no influence on pricing or business volume selection.

 

To summarize:

  • Check your pricing condition validity—ensure it covers the Final Settlement Date.
  • If you need rate application to follow time-based validity, implement the split-by-validity logic.
  • You can still use standard document types; the key is to adjust your contract type configuration accordingly.

Regards, 
Gauthier VICTOR

entry.title: Re: Contract deactivation in REFX if Asset has no postings
entry.content: Hi Andre. I have no postings in my contract. Can you explain me the action i am supposed to progress according to your screenshot?. I see there is an "undo" icon. Should I mark it? and which is the expected following screen?

entry.title: [OBX-31773] - 1H 2025 Release - Alumni Experience - Post Employment System Access - Learning access
entry.content:
Hello SAP,

I have the following question on the Alumni Experience - Post Employment System Access [OBX-31773] feature delivered with the 1H 2025 release for the Partner Q&A session.
- as this is related to Onboarding, can Alumni users access SuccessFactors Learning like Onboardees?

Roman

entry.title: Re: Tricentis XScan is failing to scan a page on Microsof...
entry.content:
Hi, Bruno,
You should log this as a case for the Tricentis team to assist (XX-PART-TRI-TTA-CLD) and they can assist you there.

Best regards,
Paula

entry.title: Different Inbound Delivery Document Type for Different STO Doc Type?
entry.content:
Hi Gurus, 

I am trying to see if I can configure different Inbound Delivery Document Types based on Different STO Doc Types.

For STO process, we are using the standard SPED output type to create the Inbound delivery automatically after O/B delivery PGI

We have 2 types of STOs, UB and ZUB based on different scenarios of STOs we do. Both currently have EL as the corresponding Inbound Delivery Document Type. Is it possible to have, say ZEL as the inbound delivery document type for ZUB only?

entry.title: Re: Onboarding New Hires Authentication using SAP Identity Authentication Service (IAS)
entry.content:
Thanks @Gopinath 

This is better, not to impose TFA for Onboardees.

Can you thus share the configurations on how the TFA can be  exempted for Onboardees?

Best Regards

Ernest Lin

entry.title: How to activate downgrade protection & CSOL in Cloud ALM instead of options checks
entry.content:
How to activate downgrade protection & CSOL in Cloud ALM instead of options checks 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to activate downgrade protection & CSOL in Cloud...
entry.content:
It is only possible to perform transport checks on CTS managed systems, at this point.  No configuration at Cloud ALM level is possible to activate the checks.

Configuration is done on a system-by-system basis.  Follow the information found in: https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-alm/applicationhelp/transport-checks 

FYI....There presently is no CSOL check in Cloud ALM -> only DGP and Cross Reference Checks.  (CSOL will come in future -> check SAP Road Map Explorer)

Best regards,

Technical Support

entry.title: Join Us: Innovate & Elevate - What's New in the May 2025 SAP Fieldglass Release Webinar
entry.content:
Join us for the upcoming Innovate & Elevate: What's New in the May 2025 SAP Fieldglass Release webinar, where we will dive into the exciting new features and innovations of the May 2025 SAP Fieldglass Release.

Webinar Details

  • Title: Innovate & Elevate: What's New in the May 2025 SAP Fieldglass Release 
  • Date: Tuesday, May 13, 2025
  • Time: 10AM Eastern Daylight Time / 4PM Central European Summer Time
  • Duration: 1 hour

Overview
The world of external workforce management is always evolving, and SAP Fieldglass is at the forefront of these transformations. This webinar is designed to keep you ahead of the curve by showcasing the latest updates and enhancements designed to streamline your processes, enhance user experiences, and boost operational efficiency.

How to Register
Click the link below to secure your spot:
Register Now

Once registration is complete, you will be sent an invitation to the webinar by email which can be added to your calendar.

entry.title: Re: Custom Fields Not Updating in BAPI_PO_CHANGE
entry.content:
Good afternoon,
My name is Raquel Souza.
I am from Brazil.
I will try to help you.

Analyzing your question, I noticed that:

Your code seems well-structured, but the custom fields isdind and branch may not be updating for some common reasons when using BAPI_PO_CHANGE. Here are some checks and possible solutions:

1. Verify if the Fields are Enabled for Update

The custom fields in EKKO may need to be activated in CI_EKKODB (Custom Include for the EKKO table). Check with a functional consultant to confirm whether these fields have been correctly added and if updates via BAPI are allowed.

2. Use the Correct Field Names in BAPI_TE_MEPOHEADER

If the custom fields isdind and branch were added via Append Structure in EKKO, you need to ensure that the correct names are used in the BAPI_TE_MEPOHEADER structure.

Example:

DATA: bapi_te_po TYPE BAPI_TE_MEPOHEADER,
bapi_te_pox TYPE BAPI_TE_MEPOHEADERX.

bapi_te_po-ZZISDIND = 'X'. " Check if the field name starts with 'ZZ'
bapi_te_po-ZZBRANCH = 'MAH'.

bapi_te_pox-ZZISDIND = 'X'.
bapi_te_pox-ZZBRANCH = 'X'.

If the actual field names in the EKKO table are different (e.g., ZZISDIND instead of ISDIND), adjust them in the code accordingly.

3. Correctly Populate the EXTENSIONIN Table

The BAPI_TE_MEPOHEADER structure must be passed to the EXTENSIONIN table. In your code, the way ext_container is filled might be incorrect. Try the following approach:

DATA: ls_extensionin TYPE BAPIPAREX.

CLEAR: ls_extensionin.
ls_extensionin-STRUCTURE = 'BAPI_TE_MEPOHEADER'.
ls_extensionin-VALUEPART1 = bapi_te_po. " Ensure correct field assignment
APPEND ls_extensionin TO it_extension.

CLEAR: ls_extensionin.
ls_extensionin-STRUCTURE = 'BAPI_TE_MEPOHEADERX'.
ls_extensionin-VALUEPART1 = bapi_te_pox.
APPEND ls_extensionin TO it_extension.

If you need to use cl_abap_container_utilities=>fill_container_c(), ensure the offset is correct (+30 might be incorrect in some cases).

4. Check the BAPI Return Messages

After executing BAPI_PO_CHANGE, always check the return table to understand possible errors.

LOOP AT lt_return INTO DATA(ls_return).
WRITE: / ls_return-TYPE, ls_return-MESSAGE.
ENDLOOP.

If there is an error, share the returned message so we can analyze it.

5. Confirm the Update in the Database

After BAPI_TRANSACTION_COMMIT, check directly in SAP if the fields were updated. You can use transaction SE16N to open the EKKO table and confirm the changes in the ISDIND and BRANCH fields.

If the fields are not updated, try adding:

WAIT UP TO 2 SECONDS.

Conclusion

✅ Verify if the fields were correctly added in EKKO.
✅ Ensure you are using the exact field names in BAPI_TE_MEPOHEADER.
✅ Correctly fill the EXTENSIONIN table.
✅ Check the BAPI return messages for errors.
✅ Confirm if the update was persisted in the database.

I hope this helps!
Good luck!!! 🚀

entry.title: Deprecation of Pixel Perfect Talent Card (PPTC)
entry.content:
In the release notes for the 1H 2025 upgrade we noticed that the Pixel Perfect Talent card was initially marked for deprecation. However, there was an announcement last week stating that the deprecation has been rolled back.

Do you have any insight on the reasons behind this decision. Additionally, could you please clarify until when we will have access to the Talent Card? We heavily rely on it in our company and are currently exploring alternative tools, but having a clear timeline would help us prepare and plan accordingly.

entry.title: Re: Select multiple values on a picklist in the job requi...
entry.content: thank you so much, is it possible in the job application template?

entry.title: Re: Unable to see destinations for BPA deployment
entry.content: Hi - were you able to resolve this? I get the same issue. I have all these 3 properties enabled on the destination.

entry.title: Re: Function module parameter not found
entry.content: A parameter is local to its procedure (as you can see: "Local Interface"), you can't use it directly in another procedure, pass it explicitly via parameters (or to avoid, transfer it to a global function group parameter).

entry.title: Re: Create SAP Build Apps applications in minutes with AI
entry.content: @patrick_schad : This is a great feature for SAP Build Apps. Could you please elaborate on how users would be able to track their AI usage of this feature. Also how would they calculate the cost of using this feature.

entry.title: SAP BTP Role with unrestricted attributes
entry.content:
Hello SAP CAP CDS Community,

I recently deployed in SAP BTP a CAP service with a role within xs-security.json with attribute having the setting "valueRequired": false in order to be created by default as unrestricted attribute.

According to the SAP Documentation https://help.sap.com/docs/btp/sap-business-technology-platform/application-security-descriptor-configuration-syntax#loio517895a9612241259d6941dbf9ad81cb__section_c1n_jfd_tkb in case of an unrestricted attribute the behavior should be the same as if the attribute would not exist for this role.

Unfourtunately, it is not the case. all the CUD operations are reporting 403 forbidden and only READ works and I can see all the entries in the list table.

In case that I specify that specific an static attribute value within the BTP role, than for the instances with that value everything works fine.

Do you experienced the same and maybe have a solution for me? Of course, on CAP service level, all entities are all annotated accordingly:

annotate...

{
        grant: ['*'],
        to   : ['DisassemblyManager'],
        where: 'name = $user.PlantGroup'
    }
Thanks in advance,
Catalin

entry.title: ABAP OOP Syntax help
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I'm having a problem accessing a table inside a method. I'm hoping someone can help formulate the correct syntax to accomplish this.

The scenario takes place after clicking on delete button of a custom class ALV. Through debug, I found only 1 variable (layout) accessible inside the method "Process_delete_records". I'd like to process the content of the table inside the method "Process_delete_records".

Here's the complete path of the table:

 

LAYOUT->FALV->CL_GUI_ALV_GRID_BASE->M_SELECTED_ROWS-ROW_ID

 

I attached some photos for your reference:

 

Hope someone can help me with this.

Thank you,

Geoff

entry.title: SoD without GRC Tool
entry.content:
Hi!

My question is a bit complex, is it possible for a company to create SoD risks without GRC tool?

I have an idea of how to have this, but I need help with ideas to automate this process and one north for starting this.

What comes to mind is to get a list of transactions that the functional/business area considers critical and define what cannot be with a single user, my point is how do I consolidate this by centralizing it in one place so that I can do simulations, for example of new access to a user and be able to identify if this can be assigned.

I know it sounds like an difficulty thing to do, but I want to at least try to have better risk control and be able to make improvements until the company acquires a GRC tool that does this type of work in an automated way.

Hello experts,

please, when trying to update mapping fields between ec and onboarding and validate, this error message appears:

entry.title: Re: SUM Prerequisite Check Extended: prepare for the real conversion run
entry.content:
Hi Boris,

I’m about to do a sandbox S/4 HANA upgrade (1909 to 2023) including a system move, so will be performing a homogeneous DMO. 

I’ve tried to run the extended pre-requisite checker on my source system, but it’s failing because the Linux version is too low (which I am aware of, but the target host has a more up-to-date Linux kernel). Initially, I’m able to ignore this error, but after the package checks, it flags the error up again, and won’t proceed any further. 
Is the extended pre-requisite checker not applicable in my situation?

entry.title: Not able to trigger the approval flow for supplier confirmation based on condition
entry.content:
Requirement: If there is a price variance in supplier confirmation compared to total value of PO (such as 5% increase+ $750 increase), then supplier confirmation needs to go in approval process. Once approved, then only it should update the PO value.

Analysis: We can add the condition in workflow but the data on which we need to do the calculation and find out the difference between the value of “supplier confirmation” and the value of “PO” is not possible. We are not getting the run time values in the BADI to perform the calculation.

Please suggest how to achieve this requirement. We are on S/4 HANA Public cloud.

entry.title: Re: Failed to load UI5 component for navigation intent "#object1-action1"
entry.content:
I solved it like this 

in transaction /n/UI2/FLPCM_CUST you will find a ICF desactivated, search for your tiles in the second tab and then service, check and show service

Copy the node automatically created in the one desactivated, right clic on z_mec and past on sap

Maybe your configuration will change for /sap/bs/ui5_ui5/sap/

entry.title: Functionality of custom transactions (PM & DMS) already available as a standard transaction code?
entry.content:
Hello community,

A client has developed three custom transaction codes (Z) for specific functionalities, as described below:

- ZPM001 (DMS & PM): Displays a list of documents directly related to Plant Maintenance Objects such as orders, notifications, functional locations and equipment (image below)

 

 

 

 - ZPM002: Assigs a SAP user to a "User status", allowing the maintenance planner to identify the originating company area (e.g HR, Maintenance, production...) of a maintenance notification. (See image below)

 - ZPM003 (PM): Enables the mass upload of order confirmations into maintenance orders from a text file. (No image attached).

I would like to check whether there are any existing Standard transaction codes that could replace these functionalities. (My initial assessment is that there aren't).

Thanks in advance,

Sebastián

Below the error popup window and view on CDS Projection View and BO from api.sap.com (CDS with Authorization Object)

Vijay

entry.title: Re: First specify the default check rule for the new cred...

entry.title: Re: Sales rebate processing - condition contract pricing
entry.content: Well, could you please share screens, how you are doing configuration? I will try to catch what is missing.

entry.title: Re: Inquiry about Outbound Delivery API in SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello, 

could you please explain what do you mean by "split delivery document creation based on a generated sales order"?
SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud standard will make a split when one of below criteria will differ from each other: 

 Ship to Party, Delivery date, Incoterms, Shipping point.

Best regards,

Patryk Walędziak

Hope you will find it helpful!

Regards,

Jagoda Drwiega | Senior SAP MM Expert

Obrigada por compartilharem!

entry.title: Re: Quantity and Alternative Quantity in Transportation C...
entry.content: Thank you...

entry.title: Re: Different Inbound Delivery Document Type for Differen...
entry.content:
Hello
 
Please do following steps:
 
1. Create Custom STO Type:
  • Configuration:
    • Go to IMG -> Material Management -> Purchasing -> Purchase Order -> Define Document Types 
       
    • Create a new entry for your custom STO type 
       
    • Assign it to the item category "U" 
    • Define the relevant confirmation control key 
       
 
2. Create Custom Inbound Delivery Type (if you haven't already):
  • Delivery Type: Create a new delivery type (e.g., "ZIN")
  • Configuration:
    • Go to IMG -> Logistics Execution -> Shipping -> Deliveries -> Define Delivery Types
    • Create a new entry for your custom delivery type
    • Define the relevant order type (e.g., DL for deliveries not linked to sales orders)
    • Assign the appropriate confirmation control key 
       
3. Assign the Custom Inbound Delivery Type to the Custom STO Type:
  • Configuration:
    • Go to IMG -> Material Management -> Purchasing -> Confirmations -> Set Up Confirmation Control
    • Create a new confirmation control key (e.g., "Z004")
    • Ensure the "GR-Relevant" and "GR Assignment Key" checkboxes are selected
    • Assign your custom inbound delivery type (e.g., "ZIN") to the confirmation control key
    • Assign your custom STO type (e.g., "ZUB") to the confirmation control key 
       
 
4. Create STO and Inbound Delivery:
  • Create STO:
    • Use transaction ME21N
    • Select your custom STO type (e.g., "ZUB")
    • Maintain the relevant data (material, quantity, etc.)
    • Save the STO
  • Create Inbound Delivery:
    • Use transaction VL31N
    • Enter the vendor and purchase order number
    • The system should automatically recognize your custom inbound delivery type based on the STO type and confirmation control settings
    • Save the inbound delivery
  • Post Goods Receipt:
    • Use transaction VL32N (Change Inbound Delivery) or VL31N (Create Inbound Delivery)
    • Post the goods receipt for the inbound delivery 

    Hope it's clarifies your query.

    Regards,

    Neeraj Jain

entry.title: Re: unable to drill down in a Crystal report chart
entry.content: Hi Keith, what version of Windows OS are they viewing the report from? Or is it on the CRS Server where this is happening? If so can they use a different PC to view the reports on...

entry.title: Re: Advanced Event Mesh for Central contracts
entry.content:
Dear @ramu_g4,

how does your SM59 connection looks like?

I would start with a first debugging here; https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/810dfd34f2cc4f39aa8d946b5204fd9c/a98c134589604bccbca85687914a8231.html?locale=de-DE

Is the technical connection itself up & running?

Thanks

Florian

entry.title: Re: ABAP OOP Syntax help
entry.content: If it's a private attribute, you can't access it except if there's a public method which accesses and returns this private attribute. If needed, create this public method. I'm afraid that your question is not giving enough details to help you more. Instead of showing screenshots of existing code, explain by creating a tiny program to support your question and paste it as code to let people reply by adapting it.

entry.title: Re: Using ABAP2XLSX to send ALV table output as Excel spreadsheet via internet email
entry.content:
Remember, there is no such thing as "on-premise" in real English.
"Premise" is a concept.
"Premises" is a location.

"https://collectivecontent.agency/2018/04/19/should-i-say-on-premise-or-on-premises-it/"

entry.title: Re: Quantity and Alternative Quantity in Transportation C...
entry.content:
Good afternoon,
My name is Rakell Souza.
I am from Brazil.
Nice to meet you!
I will try to help you.

It looks like you are facing an issue in SAP Transportation Management (SAP TM), specifically in the Transportation Cockpit (TC), where the Quantity and Alternative Quantity fields are empty.

Suggestions to solve the issue:

  1. Check if the data is being correctly populated:

    • Ensure that the Freight Units (FU) or Freight Orders (FO) have assigned quantities.

    • In SAP TM, quantities usually come from Sales Orders (SO) or Deliveries (DTR - Delivery-based Transportation Requirements).

  2. Check the Planning Profile Settings:

    • In the Transportation Cockpit, click on Change Profile Selection → Verify if the quantity display is enabled in the profile settings.

    • Try switching the planning profile to another one that may display the quantities.

  3. Validate Master Data and Documents:

    • Ensure that the products are correctly configured with Units of Measure (UoM) and that the quantities are set in the Document Flow.

    • Verify if the Material Master Data has the correct unit of measure for transportation.

  4. Check the Transport Document Data:

    • Go to the corresponding Freight Unit or Freight Order and verify if the quantities are registered there.

  5. Display Hidden Columns:

    • Click on Display Settings and check if the Quantity and Alternative Quantity columns are hidden.

  6. Technical Validation (BOPF Debugging):

    • If the data actually exists in the Freight Unit or Freight Order but does not appear in the cockpit, debugging in BOPF might be necessary to check the data structure.

If none of these options solve the issue, it could be a SAP TM configuration problem or even a technical error that requires SAP support. 🚀

entry.title: Re: Service broker error: Service broker destination-service-broker failed with: Failed to update th
entry.content: Hi, I'm having the same problem. Any solution? I saw some notes, but they're expired.

entry.title: How to allocate for integer measure in SAC
entry.content:
Hello All,

We have an situation where we need to allocate the volumes based on the percentages entered by users.

Volume is an integer measure. When we try with standard allocation, the values are allocated incorrectly.

Please find the example and scenario explained in the screenshots. 

In SAC how do we handle this scenario ? How to do allocation for integer measure ? Anyone have idea to achieve this scenario ?

entry.title: Re: SAC – Integrated Financial Planning – Data model and...
entry.content:
Hello,

Let me address your questions. 

1) At a high-level, in Integrated Financial Planning for SAP S/4HANA, the balance sheet is planned using a combination of user input and data actions.  There are 4 methods that can be assigned to each balance sheet account using the “Calc Method” property in the SAP_FI_IFP_GLACCOUNT dimension.

               CHANGING_INPUT: User enters the changing amount and the data action calculates the opening & closing amounts

               CLOSING_INPUT:  User enters the closing amount and the data action calculates the opening & changing amounts

               DRIVER_INPUT:  User doesn’t directly plan the balance sheet account but instead enters a driver such as Days Sales Outstanding or FTE.  A data action calculates the opening, changing & closing amounts for the associated balance sheet account.  I will discuss the details further down.

               CHANGING_CALC:  The data action calculates these balance sheet accounts directly.  One example is accumulated depreciation where the data action will use the depreciation planned in the P&L section as the input.  Another example is the cash account which is used to as the plug amount to balance the balance sheet.

At the end of the process, each balance sheet account, regardless of the planning method, will have an opening, changing and closing amount for each Plan period.

Your assumption regarding which accounts are planned by closing_input and which by changing_input is not entirely correct.  It is the customer’s choice on which method to use based on their business processes.  Certain accounts such as debt may be convenient to plan by closing amount while others such as PP&E may be convenient to plan by changing amount.  But by updating the “Calc Method” dimension property, you can customize it as desired.  You can also choose to exclusively use one method.

2) The second tab of the story SAP_FI_IFP_IM_FinancialStatement_Planning demonstrates driver-based planning.  The example delivered is using days sales outstanding (DSO) to plan Accounts Receivables and days payables outstanding (DPO) to plan Accounts Payable.

There are four steps:

  • Run the data action “Calculate Drivers”.  Based on last year’s actuals (e.g. Revenue, Accounts Receivable), the data action calculates historical DSO/DPO to use as a starting point
  • User adjusts the DSO/DPO amounts as desired
  • Run the data action “Calculate Closing Amounts”.  Based on the DSO/DPO drivers and previously inputted P&L amounts for plan (e.g. revenue, COGS), the data action calculates the closing amounts for the Accounts Receivable/Accounts Payable balance sheet accounts.
  • Run the data action “Calculate Balance Sheet”.  Opening & changing amounts are calculated based on the closing amounts

A customer could expand this section to use other drivers, e.g. using headcount to plan buildings, but they would be required to update the data actions with the necessary calculations.

 

3) I believe this is answered above.  Basically, customize to your needs by selecting either Changing_Input or Closing_Input.  Driver_Input can be used with the understanding of the necessary updates to the data actions.  Any balance sheet account with an empty Calc_Method is excluded from planning.

4) The fifth tab of the story SAP_FI_IFP_IM_FinancialStatement_Planning (Balance Sheet Report) or the third tab of the story SAP_FI_IFP_IM_FinancialStatement_Reports (View Balance Sheet) should be used to view the balance sheet in its entirety.  After running the data action “Calculate Balance Sheet”, the end result of all four balance sheet planning methods is available.  The other tabs in  SAP_FI_IFP_IM_FinancialStatement_Planning should be viewed as for data input only.

Best regards.

entry.title: Standard transaction or Function Module to delete Stock Transfer Requisition
entry.content:
Hi experts!

I am creating an RFC to delete the Stock Transfer Requisitions in SAP APO system. Those documents are created via BAPI_POSRVAPS_SAVEMULTI3 and they want me to provide option to delete them using only its number (not version, product nor location). STRs numbers can be observed with transaction /n/SAPAPO/RRP3  but when I try to delete them using its number with report /SAPAPO/RLCDELETE I got message "No orders exist in LiveCache" (/SAPAPO/SNP055). 
Do you know any BAPI, class or utility program to delete Stock Transfer Requisitions? Or can you bring up a code snippet or a pseudocode about what data I need to get to delete those documents? Thank you

entry.title: Re: Different Inbound Delivery Document Type for Differen...
entry.content:
Hi Neeraj,

How can you assign the custom delivery type to the custom confirmation control key? We still want to keep the internal confirmation categories as LA with the delivery type EL, and there is nowhere in the confirmation sequence for a custom confirmation control key to specify document types.

entry.title: SAP EnableNow Producer (10.8.9) can not start
entry.content: I have a problem – as soon as I launch SAP EnableNow Producer (10.8.9) to create a simulation, my computer starts lagging severely, and the Producer becomes unresponsive. I have to force close it through the Task Manager. However, I understand that this is not normal behavior; it should work differently. But I don’t know what to fix yet. My notebook has 16Gb RAM and available space on the disk

entry.title: Deleting/Recalling generated Personal Goal Statements
entry.content:
Hello,

I am creating a custom Personal Goal Statement for a client's Variable Pay plan. The templates are all functional and I can view the Personal Goal Statements that have been generated from both the Variable Pay Individual View and the worksheet.

I am however not able to recall these statements. There is no option to do so on the "Complete Compensation Cycle" tab, only the option to generate goal statements.

Is it possible to recall these personal goal statements after they have been generated?

Thanks,

James

entry.title: Enter Asset Transaction: Post Depreciation Manually - Unplanned and Planned
entry.content:
Hello, Community,

I am encountering an issue when using the app to:

  • Enter Asset Transaction: Post Depreciation Manually - Unplanned and Planned.

When attempting to generate the unplanned depreciation, I received the errors below:

 

001 Choose the transaction type appropriate for the existing asset values
002 Errors occurred for asset 1410 20000019-0 in fiscal year 2025

Posting will take place in an earlier fiscal year

I have tried adjusting the accounting period, including reopening the previous one, but we are still unable to proceed with the transaction. I also attempted to post it in the previous accounting period, but that didn't work either.

Could you please assist us in resolving this issue?

Thank you in advance for your help.

Best regards,

entry.title: Three new supply chain logistics customer stories
entry.content:
Q1 brought three customer stories of supply chain logistics transformation.  

Here's to our valued customers, and the dedicated teams who bring value to their customers.

Celsa UK: Enabling closer collaboration with carriers to create a future-ready supply chain network

"When steel producer Celsa UK looked to improve cost-efficiency and visibility across its logistics network, it realized that effective collaboration with its carriers would be key to success. To help it achieve this, the company implemented SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition, transportation management and the SAP Business Network Freight Collaboration solution."   (Celsa webinar)

✔️1-2% savings on transport costs | ✔️95% of road carriers collaborating through the network | ✔️83% on-time deliveries

Bondalti: Transforming logistics processes to better manage transportation, yard operations, and carrier collaboration

"A leading specialty chemicals and solutions company, Bondalti sought to reimagine its logistics processes. The SAP Transportation Management and SAP Yard Logistics applications as well as the SAP Business Network Freight Collaboration solution provide improved visibility and planning in transportation while integrating carriers for freight management and supply chain transparency."

✔️4% average reduction in transportation costs | ✔️90% of carrier invoices received digitally, compliant, and error-free | ✔️25% less time spent by trucks in the plants

LAPP: Keeping industries moving by delivering certainty in an unpredictable world with enhanced supply chain visibility

"Many of LAPP’s customers are manufacturing companies that operate on tight production schedules, so any delays in shipping can cause significant disruption. To give its customers more certainty about delivery dates, LAPP wanted to boost transparency and efficiency in its inbound supply chain through smarter collaboration with suppliers and carriers."

✔️90%+ faster automated confirmation of purchase orders | ✔️30%+ time savings on order management and delivery tracking for inbound deliveries | ✔️10% productivity gains for customer service and logistics teams

 

Learn more about #LogisticsVisibility: 
SAP Community posts
SAP Business Network Global Track and Trace: product tour
Coming soon: Supply Chain Logistics maturity model for self-assessment and business case

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP Role with unrestricted attributes
entry.content:
Solved by enhancing the where clause to:

where: '$user.PlantGroup = name or $user.PlantGroup is null'

entry.title: Project Cost Overview (F6991)
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I am using the app Project Cost Overview (F6991) and the costs only are displayed in global currency. Can someone help me with the settings to add other user-specific currencies?

Thank you

entry.title: Re: Maintenance Service Order in SAP S/4HANA 2022
entry.content: Hi Abhishek, is there a note stating that SAP does not recommend running Service with advanced execution on release SAP S/4HANA 2022?

entry.title: Re: EWM – Physical Inventory PI_UPLOAD transaction
entry.content:
hello thank you for the well written post. 

I have a weird issue.

I was able to successfully post the PI document with .csv file upload. But the PI document with multiple parts in a location, does not show the line items in PI_PROCESS transaction.  But the Warehouse monitor shows all the lines though.  I cannot figure out what am I missing. 

Did anyone face this issue?  Please help. 

Thanks

entry.title: SAC CSS Input Control Properties dont work
entry.content:
Hi,

any idea why these properties if input control class dont work?

.inputcontrol .sap-custom-account-input-control-widget {background-color: #ffffff; }

.inputcontrol .sap-custom-account-input-control-mark-border {border-color: rgb(0,0,0);}

 

BR

Alex

entry.title: Connecting user ids to Employees
entry.content: I am using javascript to pull a user id from a custom attribute field in process manager. I am having trouble connecting that ID to an employee variable in PG. This would allow me to assign an approval task for that specific user based off the process model attribute. Has anyone had success with this? Thanks

entry.title: SAP Integration Suite – Connect Everything FEATURING Kafka
entry.content:
Digital transformation requires powerful and flexible integration solutions to efficiently connect disparate systems. The SAP Integration Suite provides comprehensive capabilities for linking various applications and data sources.

One technology for processing large volumes of data in real time is Apache Kafka. It is a distributed event-streaming platform known for its scalability and reliability. The combination of SAP Integration Suite and Kafka enables seamless business processes with real-time data streams. This article explores three key setups for Kafka integration and is the third part in a series dedicated to exploring how SAP Integration Suite is enabling organizations to integrate everything

  1. SAP Advanced Event Mesh as a Kafka Sender

  2. SAP Advanced Event Mesh as a Kafka Receiver

  3. SAP Integration Suite Kafka Adapter

The following image illustrates the connections between the components:

Setup 1: SAP Advanced Event Mesh as a Kafka Sender

Overview: The SAP Advanced Event Mesh (AEM) enables real-time event processing within an enterprise network. In this setup, it acts as a Kafka Sender, forwarding messages to a Kafka cluster.

Use Case: An SAP system sends data to the Advanced Event Mesh, which should be published/forwarded to Kafka.

 

Create Kafka API Key

Create a Kafka API Key which will provide you access credential, there access Kafka -> access your Cluster > API Keys > Add Key.  

You already can add the correct Access Control List (ACL) you would like to use, we will do it in later step and continue with the API Key creation first, in order to establish the technical connection first. Once we have a stable connection we will configure proper access rules using ACL. Once API Key and Secret have been created, save the credentials, as you do not have access to the secret anymore. We will use them in SAP AEM to connect.

 

Setup Connection in SAP AEM : Define connection parameters to the Kafka cluster

Access the Broker you would like to use for your Kafka bridge. In the SAP AEM Cloud console navigate to Manage > Bridges

Navigate forward via Kafka Bridges >Kafka Senders> Add Kafka Sender.

Enable the Sender and ensure that you add the minimum required parameter like Bootstrap address ( you get it from your cluster), user and Secret. Click Apply and check if the connection has been established.

In case your setup was correct you will see the Admin Status and Operational Status as "Up".

Congratulations - you have established the technical connection, let's continue with the Queue Binding.  

Queue & Topic Binding

In this step we assign the Queue to the Kafka sender which will be used to forward the events and publish them to the Remote (Kafka) Topic. Besides these minimum requirements you have the option of further advanced settings, which we skip in this blog. Therefore I have created a topic (with 6 Partitions)in Kafka "WelcomeSAPEvents" which we will use.

Once you saved it you will get an error "Broker: Topic authorization failed" Why? We still need to allow that our API Key is allowed to write into that topic. Remember the very first step API Key creation. Therefore navigate in your Kafka Cluster to your API Key > Access > Topic > Edit Topic. Add our Topic "WelcomeSAPEvents" and give WRITE permission ALLOW. 

 
You have completed the SAP AEM Kafka Sender setup. Use the TryMe feature to perform a test. Let's continue in the next section with the Kafka Receiver setup.
 

Setup 2: SAP Advanced Event Mesh as a Kafka Receiver

Overview: Here, the Advanced Event Mesh receives messages from Kafka and forwards them to connected systems.

Use Case: A Kafka topic containing customer orders is subscribed to by AEM. The order data is then transferred to SAP S/4HANA or other applications.

Setup Connection in SAP AEM: Define connection parameters to the Kafka cluster

For our setup we are using the APIKey and Topic created in Setup 1.

The very first step is the Kafka Receiver Setup, therefore access the Broker you would like to use for your Kafka bridge. In the SAP AEM Cloud console navigate to Manage > Bridges> > Kafka Receiver> Add Kafka Receiver.

Enable the Receiver and ensure that you add the minimum required parameter like Bootstrap address ( you get it from your cluster), user and Secret. Click Apply and check if the connection has been established.

 Once done you will see, that the technical connect (Admin Status) has been established, but the Operational Status is display as "Down", with the error description "No remote broker in UP state". To receiver the data you have to set the right remote (Kafka) topics which you would like to subscribe.

 

Topic Binding

Navigate to Manage > Bridges> > Kafka Receiver> Choose your receiver > Topic Binding > Add Topic Binding. Maintain the parameters, in my case the topic name is "WelcomeSAPEvents". Keep in mind this is the topic name from Kafka.

Inside the topic subscription binding,  we have to maintain an internal (local) topic which will be used SAP AEM internally, in my case the topic name is "SAPAEMInternalEvent".

 

Queue Binding

In order to track the data, let's create a queue to store the data. Navigate to Queue > Create Queue.

Once done, also add the corresponding subscription to your setup.Navigate to Queue > Subscription > AddSubscription. I added the subscription forS APAEMInternalEvent.

 

Maintain correct access rights (consumer group)

The very last step is now to maintain the correct ConsumerGroupID on SAP AEM, but also in Kafka. But where should we maintain it? Let's have a look.

In SAP AEM: Navigate to Manage > Bridges> > Kafka Receiver> Choose your receiver > Settings > Advanced Settings >Section Group and maintain a group. For our setup I have decided for "test".

 

The same ConsumerGroupID we have to maintain in Kafka. Concrete we have to maintain the value within the Kafka API Key Security section. In Kafka : Navigate to Cluster Overview > API Key > Select your API > Access > Consumer group.

 

 

Congratulations, you have established the Kafka Receiver bridge in SAP Advanced Event Mesh. The Operational status of the bridge changed from "Down" to "Up". You can use the common an known monitoring tools of both applications to track the data/event exchange. In my case I have created a queue which has subscribed to the Kafka topic, therefore I simply can check the messages in this queue.

Setup 3: SAP Integration Suite Kafka Adapter

 

SAP Cloud Integration provides a Kafka Adapter that enables direct message exchange between SAP applications and Kafka clusters. This adapter supports both sending and receiving Kafka messages.

Use Case

When businesses require a direct integration between SAP Cloud Integration and Kafka for structured data exchange, this setup provides a flexible and scalable solution.

 

Key Steps

  • Configure the Kafka Adapter in SAP Cloud Integration.

  • Set up authentication and connectivity to the Kafka cluster.

  • Define integration flows to send or consume messages via Kafka topics.

  • Monitor and manage message processing through SAP Cloud Integration.

As there are already so many good blogs out there, i decided to link them, instead of repeating the setup step here again. Kindly check the blog from @ChrisQi  "Build Your First Scenario with SAP Cloud Integration Kafka Adapter" or the blog from @jens_kordowski "Cloud Integration - What You Need to Know About the Kafka Adapter".

 

Conclusion

The combination of SAP Integration Suite and Kafka opens up powerful possibilities for real-time data processing. Whether as a sender, receiver, or via the Kafka Adapter – each setup offers specific advantages and can be flexibly deployed depending on requirements.

The SAP Integration Suite remains a cornerstone of modern, event-driven architectures, enabling businesses to seamlessly connect various systems like Kafka as one event-streaming platform.

What are your experiences with Kafka integration in SAP? Share your thoughts and use cases in the comments!

entry.title: Re: Step-by-Step Guide: Sending SAP Data to SAP Event Mesh in Integration Suite (EMIS). Codeless.
entry.content:
Thanks @Benedikt_Sprung , great step-by-step guide!

Is it possible to send events to EMIS from S/4HANA using the standard Enterprise Event Enablement framework?
I understand that it would be practically the same as with BTP Event Mesh standalone service.

Thanks in advance,
Regards!

Sebastián.

entry.title: Re: Key Highlights from the 2H 2024 Release of SuccessFactors Calibration
entry.content:
We load 'Too New to Rate' rating for employees that do not meet the criteria to constitute a rating.

If we were to enforce a guideline distribution, then would a 'Too New to Rate' rating prevent the manager from finalizing the session?

Thanks,

Jennifer

entry.title: Custom button calling a custom screen
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I am working in a RAP managed scenario where we have a custom screen ( OData V4 - UI ) and on that screen we have a custom button and the requirement is:

When the user clicks on the custom button, a new screen should appear (with the same data as the home screen and new fields), on that new screen the user will fill in some data, click on a button and we will process that data.

Is it possible to build this scenario? How can I make a custom button call a custom screen? And how can I develop this new screen?

Please, any help will be appreciated.

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: AS ABAP 752 SP04, developer edition: NOW AVAILABLE
entry.content:
Hi Julie,

Will a new ASE license be made available?
The current license expires on 31-mar-2025.

Thanks,

Fabio Silva
